hero.lede: I build fast, thoughtful websites and shops — from first sketch to deployment. End-to-end, with an AI-assisted workflow that turns weeks into days.

about.title: One developer. One contact. The full stack.
about.intro: Hi, I'm André. For eight years I've been building websites and shops — as Senior Frontend Engineer at Germany's largest e-commerce platform by day, and as a freelancer for companies that want a reliable partner.
about.para2: No agency pipeline, no middle layer. Design, frontend, backend, SEO, hosting — I do it all myself. Which means shorter loops, transparent communication, and decisions that actually fit the project.
about.para3: I work AI-assisted. Not as a gimmick, but because it lets me ship with the care of a team in the time of one person.

work.title: Selected projects.
work.intro: A handful from recent years. Confidentiality honored on request — more references available.

items.title: Crypto banking that thinks in four languages.
items.desc: End-to-end web presence for the Swiss crypto and IBAN platform by GreatIdee AG (Zug). Multi-locale in DE, EN, FR and IT with App Store CTAs as the central conversion path, on top of a regulation-heavy content stack (SO-FIT, upcoming MiCA, AML/KYC). A custom WordPress theme — no page builder — paired with ACF Flexible Content delivers a block library that the client rearranges via drag-and-drop and reuses across pages. Ongoing technical maintenance and iteration since launch in 2024.

screenshots.alt: Get-started section: three steps to the app
screenshots.caption: Get-started section: the path to the app in three steps.

screenshots.alt: Live crypto market table with currency and date filter
screenshots.caption: Live crypto market: real-time prices, currency switcher and date filter — a custom shortcode the marketing team drops in wherever needed.
Feature section: one of 41 reusable ACF Flexible Content blocks.

screenshots.alt: Services section with four service cards
screenshots.caption: Services section: reordered via drag-and-drop, no developer needed.

case.challenge: A multilingual, heavily regulated fintech platform needs content the marketing team owns end-to-end — down to the order of sections on every page. Off-the-shelf page builders like Elementor or Divi cost performance, lock you out of markup control, and produce HTML a team struggles to maintain or migrate later. On top: geo-specific content (country availability, regulatory disclaimers) and four language versions (DE, EN, FR, IT), each covering dozens of pages.
case.solution: Custom Underscores-based theme instead of a page builder — full control over markup, CSS, and JS. ACF Flexible Content delivers a block library of 41 reusable section types (hero variants, feature cards, FAQ, banners, country grid, and more) that the client recombines and reorders on any page via drag-and-drop. For dynamic content — supported/non-supported countries, money transfer calculator — custom shortcodes let the marketing team drop interactive widgets into any text block. SCSS build pipeline with Stylelint and RTL support, separate desktop and mobile header templates for clean per-device navigation, multilingual architecture via WordPress gettext.
case.outcome: Launched 2024, ongoing technical maintenance and iteration since. The marketing team builds new landing pages independently from the block library — section order, content, and geo availability are all editable without involving a developer. Even global elements like header navigation, footer links, and social profiles are managed via dedicated ACF Options Pages. Scaled from launch to 30+ pages across 4 languages without restructuring the underlying CMS architecture.

items.title: A beauty studio that runs its own website end-to-end.
items.desc: Beauty institute in Oldenburg, part of the Augusta-Praxis family. Custom WordPress theme on Underscores instead of a page builder — but with page-builder convenience via ACF Flexible Content: 16 reusable section types the studio team combines, reorders, and fills with content themselves. Dynamic theming via ACF Options Pages, custom contact form handler with hCaptcha. Live since 2023, ongoing maintenance.

screenshots.alt: Team intro and content-card grid with treatment teasers
screenshots.caption: Team section and content cards: two different ACF blocks, arranged by the studio in the WP backend as needed.

screenshots.alt: Service spectrum: four-column grid with treatment lists
screenshots.caption: Service-spectrum section from the ACF service-grid block — columns and lists fully maintained by the studio.

screenshots.alt: Contact form with hCaptcha and footer
screenshots.caption: Contact form with a bespoke PHP handler: HTML5 client-side validation, server-side hCaptcha verification, dual HTML mail dispatch (studio notification plus customer auto-reply).

case.challenge: A beauty institute in Oldenburg — part of the Augusta-Praxis clinic family — needed a website the studio team could fully maintain themselves: update treatment descriptions, swap seasonal hero images, add service packages, reorder sections, all without a developer. Off-the-shelf salon templates feel interchangeable. Page builders like Elementor offer self-service but cost performance (JS bloat, lots of asset requests) and limit design freedom (rigid widget APIs, specificity battles for custom styling). Those limits had already shown up on the clinic group's previous project. On top of that: GDPR-compliant contact forms (no reCAPTCHA), WhatsApp and appointment booking as primary conversion paths, and dynamic branding adjustable without touching code.
case.solution: Custom theme on Underscores — not a page builder, but page-builder convenience via ACF Flexible Content. The studio gets its own block library of 16 reusable section types, re-arrangeable through the WP admin UI and fillable with its own content: hero carousel, service grid, content cards, Swiper-9 image slider, testimonial carousel, text-video box (YouTube, self-hosted, Instagram embed), banner, contact section, accordion, grid layouts. The team maintains content and section order itself; small design changes (primary/secondary color, logo, footer content, social links) flow through dedicated ACF Options Pages — colors are injected as CSS custom properties straight into the header, so a brand-switch needs no developer. Deliberately built as a reusable platform. Custom contact form handler in functions.php: HTML5 client-side validation, server-side hCaptcha verification, dual HTML mail dispatch (studio notification plus customer auto-reply). Bootstrap 5 grid plus Swiper 9 carousel, RTL-prepared SCSS pipeline via node-sass, custom German breadcrumb navigation, integrated WhatsApp direct link.
case.outcome: Launched 2023, with ongoing technical maintenance since. The studio team maintains all content independently — treatment descriptions, seasonal hero carousels, team introductions — via the ACF section library. The five service categories (Kosmetik⁺, HydraFacial, Sugaring, Nail Couture, Lashes & Brows) are each composed from the same block library, each with their own mega-menu entry. Contact form, direct WhatsApp link, and appointment-booking buttons offer parallel conversion paths. The theme foundation has since been reused for the clinic group's next project — same block library, same build pipeline, same form handler, with its own branding (colors, logo, content). Core updates flow into both sites simultaneously.

pricing.note: Hourly rate for maintenance, small tasks or retainer:

faq.a: 30 % deposit on signing, 70 % at launch. 14-day payment terms, bank transfer or direct debit.
Domain and hosting fees, licenses for premium plugins or stock photography, and ongoing maintenance after the included support window.

faq.q: How long does a project take?
faq.a: Landing in 1–2 weeks, full website 4–6 weeks, webshop 6–10 weeks. Exact timeline after the discovery call.
2–3 months of support included depending on tier. After that, optional maintenance retainer or hourly billing.
